rationale: Every discriminator is genuinely RED at 50165d81. Both round-7 tests have zero Go-code hits (brief greps exit 1), and zero hits at the pinned bcb255eb via git grep; round-6 names likewise zero at 18cc59d9. All 16 named new tests across approve/lifecycle/complete/executor are absent; AC4's ScanOrphanedClosedBeads anchor is 0 hits repo-wide; AC8's removed-line grep is 0 vs main with the parity phrase present exactly once; AC9's ADR/skill greps are 0 across all three surfaces. No AC1-AC13 proof is GREEN. AC13 soundly pins the leg: probe seam forced to miss + worktree-enumerated non-ancestor -> refuse with terminal fns seam-recorded uncalled, so revert-to-probe-only turns subtest (a) RED; list-error fail-closed and two no-false-positive subcases included. AC10's structural exactly-one-workflow-claimant test is RED-on-revert; the old grep -l (GREEN today) is correctly demoted to a labeled non-discriminating pin. Every AC pairs its existence grep with an exact-named -run; no dangling refs to the deleted classifier (BranchExistsE/show-ref 0 in Go). Same-source claim verified literally: defaultWorktreeOps.List() (mindspec_executor.go:44-46) wraps bead.WorktreeList() (bdcli.go:202). All cited SHAs exist; Validation Proofs true as written.

findings.item: R1 worktree-enumeration merge-prevention leg (round-7 Option B point 1)
findings.note: Added to R1 alongside (not replacing) the BranchExists/shared-predicate detection; fail-closed on WorktreeList/ancestry error; epic-scoped; shared FindOrphanedClosedBeads unchanged for complete/next/doctor. Same-source claim empirically exact: FinalizeEpic's WorktreeOps.List() (mindspec_executor.go:383, :44-46) is bead.WorktreeList() (bdcli.go:202), which internal/approve can consume via its existing bead import (impl.go:13) — ADR-0030-clean, no executor git-IO.

0 Go-code hits at 50165d81 (grep exits 1) and at pinned bcb255eb. Subtest (a) is a true revert-to-probe-only discriminator (probe seam forced to miss, so only the new leg can refuse); terminal fns pinned uncalled; (b) list-error fail-closed; (c) ancestor and different-spec-worktree no-false-positive. Exact-named -run in the proof.

Non-Goals claims closed-by-design (not 'implausible', not an audited-refutation residual); Fact 2 re-scoped to 'PERSISTENTLY missing/corrupt' ref, deleting the round-6 overclaim; the two-List() concurrent-mutation window is disclosed and bounded by the serialized one-mutator model; Goal discloses all three residuals; single-snapshot handoff noted as future hardening; OQ4 no-seam stands. Falsified-if list in R1 includes the round-6 race, the leg's fail-open, and the leg's false positives.

TestLifecycleOwnershipExactlyOneWorkflowClaimant: 0 Go-code hits at 50165d81 and bcb255eb — RED. Pins whole-set exactly-one-claimant=workflow, catching both revert and third-domain claim. The pre-applied grep -l one-liner (GREEN today, verified) is explicitly demoted to a non-discriminating regression pin in Validation Proofs, never the AC proof.

findings.item: AC1-AC13 full falsifiability walk + Validation Proofs accuracy
findings.note: All 16 named tests absent at HEAD; every AC proof chains an existence grep with an exact-named go test -run; AC8 (diff-grep, phrase present once) and AC9 (0 hits in ADR-0037 and all three skill surfaces) also RED; negative pins hold (BranchExistsE and show-ref 0 in Go code); no dangling refs to rounds-2..5 classifier tests; all pinned SHAs (eb6a2ed1, 77d8a1a9, 18cc59d9, bcb255eb, e239c4e5) exist; ownership one-liner passes as the labeled pin. No AC is GREEN at 50165d81.
